backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (Project, Task, Document, Media, Contact, CostItem, etc.), state variables using Maps and Sets, and implementing team/invite functionality with access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including welcome screen, family/team creation and joining, invite codes, logout functionality, and team management with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose, key features, and recent changes including routing, hooks, pages, components, and styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Umbau Manager V2 application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component initializing PDF.js worker globally, managing authentication flow, routing between pages (dashboard, roadmap, tasks, etc.), handling profile setup and welcome screen logic, and providing QueryClient and theme context.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Main layout component with collapsible sidebar (offcanvas on desktop, overlay on mobile), header with theme toggle and user menu, navigation menu for all pages including Kontakte and Kostenübersicht, and footer attribution.
frontend/src/components/BaseDialog.tsx: Reusable dialog wrapper component with standardized behavior preventing accidental closes, configurable max-width, scrollable content, and consistent header structure for title and description.
frontend/src/components/CalendarView.tsx: Displays a monthly calendar grid showing projects and tasks by date, with navigation controls and support for filtering undated projects. Includes date-based filtering logic for projects with start/end dates and tasks with due dates.
frontend/src/components/CalendarWidget.t: Dashboard widget showing the next 5 upcoming events (project starts and task due dates) sorted chronologically. Formats dates and times in German locale.
frontend/src/components/CostItemsSection: Manages cost items for a project with add/remove functionality, categorization (Energie, Material, etc.), status tracking (geplant, bezahlt, offen), and displays total cost in EUR. Generates unique IDs and timestamps for new cost items.
frontend/src/components/DeleteConfirmDia: Reusable confirmation dialog for delete operations with customizable title, description, and item name display. Supports pending state during deletion.
frontend/src/components/DynamicSelect.ts: Select dropdown component with ability to add new options dynamically via a dialog. Validates for duplicates and empty values, showing toast notifications for feedback.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React error boundary component that catches rendering errors and displays a fallback UI with error message and reload button. Logs errors to console for debugging.
frontend/src/components/JoinFamilyDialog: Dialog for joining a family using an invite code, with validation and error handling for invalid/expired/used codes. Uses useJoinFamily mutation hook and displays German error messages.
frontend/src/components/PDFThumbnail.tsx: Renders a thumbnail preview of a PDF's first page using PDF.js, with localStorage caching to avoid redundant rendering and quota management.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for initial user profile setup, collecting name, email, and user type (private/business) with form validation.
frontend/src/components/ProjectTimelineI: Tabbed input component allowing users to specify project timeline either as exact start/end dates or as month ranges.
frontend/src/components/team/InviteMembe: Dialog for generating role-based invite tokens and displaying copyable invitation URLs for adding team members with admin, user, or guest permissions.
frontend/src/components/team/TeamTab.tsx: React component for managing team members with role-based access control, allowing admins to invite, remove, and update member roles (admin/user/guest). Displays team member list with badges, edit dialogs, and handles permission checks.
frontend/src/components/UnifiedPDFViewer: Full-featured PDF viewer dialog with page navigation, zoom controls, download, fullscreen mode, and multi-level caching (ArrayBuffer and rendered page DataURLs).
frontend/src/components/UpcomingTasksWid: Dashboard widget displaying up to 7 upcoming tasks sorted by due date, showing priority, category, project association, and date/time information.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance with authentication, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity persistence, and authentication state with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralized React Query hooks for all backend data operations including user profiles, team management, tasks, projects, documents, media, costs, contacts, and links with mutation handlers and toast notifications.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining light and dark theme color schemes using OKLCH color space for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and component variants.
frontend/src/lib/customCategories.ts: Local storage management utilities for custom category lists (Gewerke, Bereiche, Kategorien, Media, Documents) with default values and functions to get, add, and persist user-defined categories.
frontend/src/lib/dateUtils.ts: Date utility functions for handling bigint timestamps (nanoseconds), including week calculations, German date formatting, date conversions, and month range operations for the application.
frontend/src/lib/focusManager.ts: Provides React hooks for managing focus in modal dialogs, including useFocusOnMount for auto-focusing elements when dialogs open and useFocusWithRestore for restoring focus when dialogs close.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/ApplyInvite.tsx: Handles team invitation flow by extracting invite token from URL, prompting user to login if needed, claiming the token via API, and redirecting on success.
frontend/src/pages/Contacts.tsx: Manages contacts and helpful links with CRUD operations, filtering by role/category, search functionality, and includes a TeamTab component for team member management.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard displaying projects, tasks, cost overview, calendar view, and upcoming tasks with dialogs for creating new projects and tasks including timeline and cost item management.
frontend/src/pages/Documents.tsx: Document management page with folder-based organization, PDF upload queue with progress tracking, thumbnail previews, unified PDF viewer, and CRUD operations for documents with status tracking.
frontend/src/pages/Kostenuebersicht.tsx: Cost overview page displaying all cost items across projects in a sortable/filterable table with inline editing, document linking, PDF viewing, and ability to add/delete cost items.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page component that displays a welcome screen with feature highlights and an Internet Identity authentication button. Uses the useInternetIdentity hook to handle login flow with loading states.
frontend/src/pages/Media.tsx: Media management page with grid/list views, drag-and-drop reordering, upload functionality, and filtering by category. Supports both images and PDFs with thumbnail previews, editing, deletion, and dynamic category management.
frontend/src/pages/Roadmap.tsx: Project roadmap page with list and calendar views, supporting project CRUD operations with timeline management (exact dates or month ranges). Includes cost items tracking, category filtering, and contact assignment with role-based kunde field visibility.
frontend/src/pages/Tasks.tsx: Task management page with kanban-style status columns, filtering by search, status, priority, and project. Supports task CRUD operations with dynamic categories (Gewerke/Bereiche), due dates, contact assignments, and URL-based task selection from Dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/WelcomeScreen.tsx: Onboarding screen for new users to either create a new family or join an existing one via invitation code. Includes logout functionality and uses React Query for family creation/joining mutations.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing. Includes sessionStorage integration for parameter persistence across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, sidebar/chart/card colors, border radius variables, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking for FamilyHub app with invite code system features, documenting architectural notes about HashMap-based one-time invite codes, existing welcome screen features, and pending backend API export requirements.
